product_owner.role: Lead interactive discovery session to collect feature requirements from user

available_tools.description: You have access to the following tools for executing this task. Tool mappings are defined in .claude/tools/tool-mappings.xml and full documentation is in .claude/tools/available-tools.xml

tool.name: Read
tool.description: Read existing project files for context

tool.name: Write
tool.description: Create context files from discovery results

tool.name: perplexity_mcp
tool.usage: Research market trends, competitive analysis, user personas

tool.name: exa_mcp
tool.usage: Search for industry standards, similar implementations, market data

tool.name: code_reasoning_mcp
tool.usage: Analyze technical feasibility and requirements complexity

available_tools.tool_usage_guidelines: - Use Read to examine existing project documentation - Use perplexity_mcp for market research and competitive analysis - Use exa_mcp for finding industry examples and standards - Use code_reasoning_mcp for technical feasibility analysis - Use Write to create context files from research results - Use TodoWrite to track discovery and research progress

prompt.task: Conduct a comprehensive user discovery interview to collect all information needed for PRD generation. Transform raw feature ideas into structured requirements with supporting research context.

phase.name: user_interview
phase.description: Interactive Q&A session to gather core feature requirements

question.prompt: What feature or problem are you trying to solve? Please describe your idea in 1-2 sentences.

follow_ups.follow_up: What specific pain point does this address?
How are users currently handling this problem?

question.prompt: Who are your target users for this feature?

follow_ups.follow_up: What role do they have? (e.g., content creator, presenter, student)
What's their typical workflow when creating presentations?

question.prompt: What business value would this feature provide?

follow_ups.follow_up: Can you quantify the expected impact? (e.g., "increase engagement by 20%")

question.prompt: How would you measure if this feature is successful?

examples.example: User adoption rate (% of users who try the feature)
Usage frequency (times used per user per month)

question.prompt: Walk me through how a user would interact with this feature. What's the ideal user flow?

follow_ups.follow_up: Where in the current SlideHeroes interface would this fit?
What should happen before and after they use this feature?

question.prompt: Do you have any technical preferences or constraints?

examples.example: Should integrate with existing AI services (Portkey)

question.prompt: Are there any timeline constraints or deadlines we should be aware of?

follow_ups.follow_up: Is this urgent or can it be planned for a future sprint?
Are there any external dependencies (conferences, product launches, etc.)?

question.prompt: Would you prefer to start with a simple MVP version or build the full feature at once?

options.option: MVP first - get something working quickly
Full feature - build it right the first time

phase.name: market_research
phase.description: Use AI tools to research market context and competitive landscape

area.name: competitive_analysis
area.description: Research how competitors handle similar features

queries.query: How do [competitors] handle [similar feature]? What are the industry standards?
What are users saying about [similar features] in [domain]? What pain points exist?

area.name: user_research
area.description: Research user behavior and preferences in this domain

queries.query: What do [target users] value most when [using similar tools]?
What are common workflow patterns for [user persona] when [relevant task]?

area.name: market_trends
area.description: Research current trends and emerging patterns

queries.query: What are the latest trends in [feature domain] for [industry]?
What emerging technologies are relevant to [feature type]?
Best practices for implementing [feature type] in web applications

phase.name: context_generation
phase.description: Generate structured context files from discovery and research

interview_guidelines.pacing: one question at a time, wait for complete answers
interview_guidelines.clarification: ask follow-up questions when answers are vague
interview_guidelines.validation: summarize understanding before moving to next question

next_steps.recommendation: Ready to proceed to PRD generation phase
next_steps.context_package: All required context files have been created
next_steps.handoff_notes: Key insights and constraints for PRD generation

quality_gates.completeness: All required questions answered with sufficient detail
quality_gates.clarity: User requirements are clear and unambiguous
quality_gates.research_depth: Market research provides adequate competitive and user context
quality_gates.technical_feasibility: No obvious technical red flags identified
quality_gates.business_alignment: Feature aligns with SlideHeroes business objectives

context_files.file: business-context.md - Business value and success metrics
user-research.md - Target users and journey mapping
market-trends.md - Industry context and emerging patterns

handoff_to_prd.research_insights: Key findings from market and competitive research
